content.en:
Now.

Ye Tian's ranking on the emperor list was not high, which made Mu He misunderstand Ye Tian's strength and thought that Ye Tian was not strong.

Rumble!!!!

Mu He's body erupted with a strong killing intent, if he killed Ye Tian, then not only could he get a lot of battle points, but he could also get the rewards of his elders, and his reputation would skyrocket!

So, Mu He shot with all his might.

However, in the face of Ye Tian, his strength was nothing at all.

"Arrowmu's Blade!"

"True Lin Form First Form!"

Ye Tian didn't even use the second form, just relying on the first form of the True Lin Form of the Consummation Realm, he burst out with terrifying killing power.

Burst!!!

Mu He's special form and defense were directly cut by Ye Tian's Arrow Mother's Blade, and the ultimate particles on his body shattered.

With just one blow, Muhe was hit hard.

At the slightest thought, he will flee.

Airplanes!

A silver light covered his body, as if he was about to flee.

But at this time, Ye Tian held the void in his hand, and the power of the rudimentary form of the Ultimate Rule Domain was constantly compressed around Mu He, and the silver light was bound by the countless rudimentary powers of the Ultimate Rule Realm, and in the end, it still did not break the shackles of the rudimentary form of the Ultimate Rule Domain.

Then, Ye Tian slashed over with another knife, completely killing Mu He, and the ultimate particles in his body shattered, and he could no longer recover.

And 020 With the fall of Mu He, Ye Tian received an amazing performance reward.

300,000 points!

"It is worthy of being a strong man at the top of the emperor list, if you kill one, you can earn 300,000 battle points!"

Ye Tian thought, if he killed a top ten powerhouse on the emperor list, how many battle points would he be able to get!

But such a reward for performance points is also very reasonable, after all, such an emperor list powerhouse, once he breaks through to the existence of the ancient demon level, I am afraid that he can break through to the top ancient demon level powerhouse level in a short period of time, and even in the future, he will definitely be able to break through to the peak ancient demon level level.

A peak ancient demon-level existence, and it is also an extremely powerful peak ancient demon-level existence, which is almost invincible under the ultimate ancient demon, and for a main department, it is also the main combat power.

After all, the ultimate ancient demon will not be easy to use, and the battle power competition will naturally rely on the existence of the peak ancient demon level.

Therefore, killing such an Emperor List powerhouse is equivalent to killing a future peak ancient demon-level existence.

Of course, it is not easy to kill such an emperor powerhouse, and they all have means to save their lives and escape methods.

If it weren't for Ye Tian's possession of the prototype of the Ultimate Rule Realm, and the coverage was very wide, and the strong were extremely high, the other party's escape methods would not be able to break through the Ultimate Rule Realm Prototype, otherwise, the other party would have run away long ago.

In other words, there are other emperor list powerhouses whose strength is no less than Ye Tian, and I am afraid that they will not be able to keep an emperor list powerhouse like Mu He at all.

And after the fall of Muhe.

Dom Fortress.

On the emperor list, Mu He's name disappeared, and the emperor list powerhouse behind him automatically improved one place, while the emperor list was only 364.

The Emperor List powerhouse, who had been paying attention to the Emperor List, naturally noticed this scene, and soon found out that it was Mu He who disappeared from the Emperor List.

Mu He's strength is extremely strong, and it is impossible to be kicked out of the emperor list, so there is only one possibility, that is, Mu He has fallen.

Mu He is a strong person with more than 80 people on the emperor list, and there is still room for improvement, and it is not impossible to become the top 30 on the emperor list in the future.

Now, the Muhe has fallen, which is a major loss for the main department of Dom.

What's more, Muhno is a member of the main tribe of Dom, not a tribe under the command of the main tribe of Dom.

At the first moment, Dom's main department was furious.

Dom Fortress.

Rumble!!!!

A terrifying top-notch Ancient Demon-level existence summoned other Ancient Demon-level beings.

This top-level Ancient Demon-level existence is the Doha Ancient Demon, and his strength is invincible in the top-level Ancient Demon-level existence, and he can break through to the peak Ancient Demon-level existence at any time, and his family has an Ultimate Ancient Demon.

And Doha Gumo is Muhe's grandfather, and although Muhe is one of his many grandchildren, he is the one with the most potential.

How, Muhe fell, and the ancient demons of Doha were naturally extremely angry.

"Who killed Mu He?"

Ahba said angrily.

An ancient demon-level powerhouse bowed his head and said.

"Go and find out, I need to know who killed my grandson and Mom He!"

The Doha Ancient Demon said angrily.

Immediately, the ancient demon-level existence of Dom's main department went to investigate.

In fact, it is not difficult to find out, although they can't deduce who is the murderer here, but it must be done by the emperor list powerhouses in several nearby fortresses, they only need to contact the spies in these fortresses, and know from them which emperor list powerhouse has improved in ranking, then it must be who did it.

Sure enough, after such a check, Ye Tian was soon exposed.

"Lord Doha Ancient Demon, it has been found out, there is a strong man on the Emperor List of the Arrow Mu Fortress, named Tian, who was behind the Emperor List before, but at the time of Mu He's fall, his ranking skyrocketed, and he has entered the top 100 of the Emperor List, it should be him!"

"Heaven of the main department of the mother of Aluo, I will kill him myself!!"

The Doha Ancient Demon said angrily.

And at this time, the ancient demon persuaded and said: "Lord Doha Ancient Demon, you can't do it yourself, there are also unwritten rules between our main departments, the top ancient demon level is not allowed to face the opponent of the Emperor List, if you break this rule, the other main departments will do the same, and then the life of the Emperor List powerhouse cannot be guaranteed." Once the matter becomes serious, the peak Ancient Demon level of the main department, or even the ultimate Ancient Demon Lord, will punish you!"

Hearing this, the Doha Ancient Demon quickly calmed down.

He really can't do it, and if he does it and breaks the rules, it won't be good.

He is only a top-level ancient demon, and he can't break the agreement between the main departments, otherwise he won't end well.

He can't do it, but other ordinary ancient demon-level existences can, and the emperor list powerhouses at the top of the emperor list can also use their hands to attack and kill Ye Tian.

So, he said that he moved some ancient demon-level powerhouses and several emperor list powerhouses.

However, after Ye Tian killed Mu He, he stayed in the Arrow Mu Fortress and couldn't come out, which made the Doha Ancient Demon very helpless.

And at this time.

Ye Tian was also completely famous in the Aluo Mu Fortress, after all, the news that he had killed Mu He spread quickly, and everyone was shocked.

Somewhere in the fortress of Arromu.

Wei and Aoi are also here, and the two meet and chat.

Although the Golden God Department withdrew from the Huoxi space-time battlefield, as a strong man on the emperor list, Wei was still qualified to enter here, and he also wanted to continue to improve his strength, so he continued to stay in the Arrow Mu Fortress.

"Tian actually killed Mu He, Mu He has the means to save his life, and he is still in the hands of Tian, his strength should become strong again!"

Wei said.
